overall.description: Aerial drone footage from Cyberpunk 2077 capturing a slow leftward pan across a futuristic city at night. The clip transitions from a hillside residential area with illuminated winding roads to a dense downtown skyline filled with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, all enveloped in a moody, foggy atmosphere with teal and orange lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic hillside residential district with illuminated winding roads

events.description: holographic advertising tower exits frame right as camera continues panning left
distant downtown skyline becomes more prominent through the haze

agents.ego_description: slowly panning the aerial camera left across the hillside residential area, capturing the illuminated road networks

entered.detail: tall building with large blue holographic face advertisement
modern glass tower adjacent to the holographic building
snake-like road with warm orange street lights winding up the hillside
dark vegetated hillside with scattered residential structures
tall palm trees silhouetted against the sky
low-rise residential structures built into the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a futuristic hillside residential area at night. A prominent holographic advertising tower stands on the right while illuminated roads wind through the dark terrain below. The camera slowly pans left, gradually revealing more of the hillside and the distant downtown skyline through the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense futuristic downtown business district with towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera pans to reveal the dense downtown skyline with numerous illuminated skyscrapers and holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: panning across the downtown skyline showcasing the dense urban architecture and towering structures

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers forming the city center
tall glass towers with bright interior and exterior lighting
large floating advertisements and building-mounted holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its pan to reveal the dense downtown skyline, with towering illuminated skyscrapers dominating the view. The hillside terrain remains visible in the foreground left, but the focus shifts to the futuristic city center with its bright lights and holographic advertisements piercing through the night haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow aerial pan that transitions from a quiet, futuristic hillside residential area into the overwhelming scale of a dense downtown skyline. It begins with a view of illuminated roads winding through dark terrain, anchored by a prominent holographic advertising tower on the right. As the camera glides leftward, the hillside gradually recedes into the foreground while the hazy atmosphere begins to reveal the distant silhouettes of a city center. The scene then expands to fully unveil a forest of towering illuminated skyscrapers and piercing holographic advertisements that dominate the night sky. Finally, the focus shifts entirely to the glowing urban core, leaving the residential slopes behind as the city's bright lights pierce through the lingering haze.
